claim_boundary: Failure-analysis artifact only; no G005 completion, no D2E G-IDM win, no FDM-1 parity claim.
interpretation: Temporal sequence-level masked diffusion exercised the GPU much better and is more faithful to FDM-1 IDM than factor-only heads, but the first prefix80k configuration collapsed to no key/button emissions on the target prefix.
This is a model/calibration operating-point failure, not a completion signal: no-button FPR is zero only because predicted button examples are zero.

Next branch should keep temporal sequence modeling but add split-safe confidence budget/top-k unmasking for non-noop action tokens, stronger class weights or focal token loss, and possibly train longer/larger after a small calibration probe.
next_recipe_faithful_actions: Add non-noop confidence budgeted iterative unmasking for temporal sequence outputs using held-out train/calibration rows, analogous to the earlier button budget but over full action-token slots.
Add focal or logit-adjusted token cross-entropy for sparse key/button tokens while preserving the sequence-level masked diffusion objective.
Run a smaller CPU/GPU calibration probe before another H200 reservation; then promote only if target emits nonzero key/button tokens under no-button FPR <= 0.10.
